'''Vinto''' was a green [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] scoundrel and a member of [[Mynnic]]'s band of adventurers around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. He wore [[Goggles/Legends|goggles]], a flashy [[Cape/Legends|cape]], and many pockets in which he hid weapons and treasures.<ref name="JC" />

{{Char-stub}}
